info.title: Azure Data Explorer Utilities
info.description: Provides a set of utilities for working with Azure Data Explorer such as schema and data export

commands.name: export
commands.description: Export a database schema with optional data items

options.name: --export
options.description: Comma-separated list of tables to export data for

options.name: --function
options.description: Comma-separated list of functions or function folders(followed by /) to ignore (e.g. function1,folder1/)

options.name: --ignore
options.description: Comma-separated list of tables to ignore

options.name: --output
options.description: Path for the output file to be written to

options.name: --rename
options.description: Comma-separated list of tables to be renamed (e.g. table1=table2,table3=table4)

options.name: --update
options.description: Table to be updated (e.g. table=table1,columnType=int, columnToAdd=column,columnToDrop=column)"

options.name: --ignore
options.description: Comma-separated list of tables to ignore

options.name: --function
options.description:
Comma-separated list of functions or function
folders(followed by /) to ignore (e.g. function1,folder1/)

options.name: --rename
options.description:
Comma-separated list of tables to be renamed (e.g.
table1=table2,table3=table4)

options.name: --export
options.description: Comma-separated list of tables to export data for

options.name: --output
options.description: (Default: .) Path for the output file to be written to

options.name: --update
options.description:
Table to be updated (e.g. table=table1,columnType=int,
columnToAdd=column,columnToDrop=column)"

options.name: --cluster
options.description: Required. The cluster id to export from

options.name: --database
options.description: Required. Specifies the database to be exported

options.name: --use-cli
options.description:
(Group: Authentication Method) Use the Azure CLI for
authentication

options.name: --client-id
options.description:
(Group: Authentication Method) The application id (client
id) of the service principal being used for authentication

options.name: --client-secret
options.description: The client secret of the service principal being used for

options.name: --authority
options.description:
The authority (e.g. contoso.com) or AAD tenant id to
authenticate against

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.
